summary: Killer‑sounding audience recording captures a smoky show with standout Comes A Time > Deal, Terrapin Station and Throwing Stones.
review: The audience tape is remarkably clear and full‑bodied, delivering an immersive listening experience. Musically the concert smokes, highlighted by a tight Comes A Time > Deal segue, a hot Terrapin Station despite a brief vocal slip, and a solid Throwing Stones, though Phil’s Tom Thumb segment fell short of his best.

ai_rating.rationale: One detailed review gives the show a 4‑star rating and praises both performance and sound quality; minor vocal slip and a weaker Tom Thumb keep it from perfect.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as "killer sounding aud" with crisp, full‑bodied audio and no reported dropouts or muddiness.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set closes short with a strong Comes A Time > Deal transition; the second half maintains high energy with Terrapin Station and Throwing Stones, overall a consistently smoky performance.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Vocal slip on Terrapin Station – a couple of verses messed up, but guitar work remains solid.
band_member_comments.Phil: Tom Thumb segment not among his better performances despite the overall smoke.
